leagueBriefing: The Celtics and Timberwolves flexed their muscles with dominant double-digit victories, while the Grizzlies pulled off a gritty upset over the Nuggets. Meanwhile, the Lakers took care of business in a rescheduled matchup against the Rockets to keep their momentum swinging in the right direction.

games.headline: Celtics stifle Warriors in dominant finals rematch
games.brief: Boston's defense turned the lights out on Golden State, holding the Warriors under 100 points in a statement win at the Garden. The Celtics used a balanced scoring attack and physical perimeter defense to pull away early, never letting the Warriors find their rhythm from deep.
bullets: Jayson Tatum led all scorers with 28 points, adding 8 rebounds and 5 assists.
The Celtics held Stephen Curry to just 18 points on 6-of-17 shooting.
Boston outscored Golden State 54-36 in the paint.
The Warriors shot a season-low 22% from beyond the arc.
games.context: Boston moves closer to clinching the top seed in the Eastern Conference.

highlights.title: WARRIORS at CELTICS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Thunder cruise past Nets as Gilgeous-Alexander shines
games.brief: The Thunder didn't waste any time in Brooklyn, jumping out to a massive lead and never looking back. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander orchestrated the offense with ease, while the Thunder defense harassed the Nets into nearly 20 turnovers in a lopsided affair.
bullets: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander posted 31 points and 9 assists in just three quarters.
Chet Holmgren anchored the defense with 5 blocks and 12 rebounds.
The Nets were held to a dismal 38% shooting from the field.
OKC scored 26 points off Brooklyn turnovers.
games.context: The Thunder maintain their slim lead for the #1 seed in the Western Conference.

highlights.title: THUNDER at NETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Trail Blazers outlast Pacers in high-scoring shootout
games.brief: In a game where defense was optional, Portland found an extra gear in the fourth quarter to silence the Gainbridge Fieldhouse crowd. The Blazers' backcourt took over late, hitting several clutch triples to stave off an Indiana comeback attempt.
bullets: Anfernee Simons exploded for 34 points, including six three-pointers.
Tyrese Haliburton finished with 22 points and 14 assists in the loss.
Portland shot 52% from the field as a team.
The Blazers' bench outscored the Pacers' reserves 41-28.
games.context: Portland keeps their slim Play-In Tournament hopes alive with the road win.

highlights.title: TRAIL BLAZERS at PACERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Raptors dismantle Bulls in historic offensive explosion
games.brief: The Raptors looked like a championship contender in Chicago, putting up a staggering 139 points against a lackluster Bulls defense. Toronto shared the ball beautifully, recording a season-high in assists and turning the game into a rout before the third quarter ended.
bullets: Scottie Barnes recorded a triple-double with 24 points, 11 rebounds, and 10 assists.
Toronto finished with 38 total team assists.
The 139 points marked the Raptors' highest scoring total of the season.
Chicago has now lost four straight games, all by double digits.
games.context: Toronto solidifies its position in the middle of the Eastern Conference playoff pack.

games.headline: Timberwolves howl past Jazz in 36-point blowout
games.brief: Minnesota put on a clinic at Target Center, scoring nearly 150 points in a game that felt over by halftime. The Timberwolves dominated every facet of the game, feasting in transition and burying the Jazz under a mountain of three-pointers and second-chance points.
bullets: Anthony Edwards fueled the rout with 33 points in only 28 minutes of play.
Minnesota set a franchise record for points scored in a regulation game.
The Wolves shot 58% from the floor and 48% from deep.
Utah committed 22 turnovers, leading to 31 Minnesota points.
games.context: Minnesota remains in a dead heat with OKC for the top seed in the West.

highlights.title: JAZZ at TIMBERWOLVES | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Pelicans soar past Clippers behind Zion's power display
games.brief: The Pelicans used their size and athleticism to overwhelm the Clippers in the Big Easy. Zion Williamson was a force of nature in the paint, while New Orleans' wing defenders made life miserable for Kawhi Leonard and James Harden throughout the night.
bullets: Zion Williamson dominated with 32 points and 10 rebounds.
The Pelicans out-rebounded the Clippers 52-38.
James Harden was held to 12 points on 3-of-12 shooting.
New Orleans went on a 15-2 run to close out the third quarter.
games.context: The Pelicans move into the top six, potentially avoiding the Play-In Tournament.

highlights.title: CLIPPERS at PELICANS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Hawks stun Mavericks in high-octane upset
games.brief: Despite another monster performance from Luka Doncic, the Mavericks couldn't stop an Atlanta team that seemed to hit every shot they took. The Hawks moved the ball with precision, finding open shooters and exploiting a Dallas defense that looked a step slow all night.
bullets: Trae Young led the charge with 30 points and 12 assists.
Luka Doncic's 41-point effort wasn't enough to carry Dallas.
Atlanta shot a blistering 55% from three-point range.
The Hawks' bench contributed a massive 48 points.
games.context: A significant blow to Dallas' hopes of securing home-court advantage in the first round.

highlights.title: HAWKS at MAVERICKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Grizzlies grind out upset over Jokic and Nuggets
games.brief: In a makeup game from January, the Grizzlies showed they can still bang with the heavyweights. Memphis used a gritty defensive effort in the closing minutes to stall the Nuggets' offense, surviving a late Nikola Jokic surge to secure a hard-fought home win.
bullets: Ja Morant returned to form with 29 points and 11 assists.
Nikola Jokic recorded 35 points, 14 rebounds, and 8 assists in the loss.
Memphis outscored Denver 20-10 on second-chance points.
The Nuggets turned the ball over three times in the final two minutes.
games.context: Memphis bolsters their Play-In positioning with a win over the defending champs.

highlights.title: NUGGETS at GRIZZLIES | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Davis and James power Lakers past young Rockets
games.brief: The Lakers relied on their veteran stars to navigate a tricky road game in Houston. Anthony Davis dominated the interior while LeBron James controlled the tempo, allowing the Lakers to pull away in the fourth quarter after the Rockets had trimmed the lead to two.
bullets: Anthony Davis finished with 30 points, 15 rebounds, and 3 blocks.
LeBron James added 26 points and 10 assists.
The Lakers shot 15-of-30 from three-point range.
Alperen Sengun led Houston with 24 points and 12 boards.
games.context: The Lakers continue to climb the standings as they fight for a guaranteed playoff spot.

highlights.title: LAKERS at ROCKETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 18, 2026
